Itemized  ·  Procedures  ·  Echocardiogram, complete with Doppler  ·  California

Echocardiogram, complete with Doppler cost in California.

Cash-pay range for echocardiogram, complete with doppler across 49 hospitals in California: $54 to $6,767. CPT code 93306. Pulled from each hospital's federally-mandated price transparency file.

Cheapest in California
$54
Adventist Health Glendale
Glendale, CA
vs.
Most expensive in California
$6,767
USC Verdugo Hills Hospital
Glendale, CA

A consumer reading of CMS-mandated MRF data. Not medical or financial advice. Itemized · itemized.health
